prestazioni: LT4 (6.2L Supercharged V8) engine: Replace the OEM Eaton TVS 2300 supercharger with a Whipple 3.0L Gen 5 W185ax supercharger kit (18 psi boost, 850+ hp), paired with a custom billet crankshaft pulley from ATI Performance (7.5" diameter) and a Kenne Bell Boost-a-Pump to support the fuel system with dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pumps.

Exhaust: Install a full titanium 3.5" diameter exhaust system from Burns Stainless (equal-length headers, merge collectors, and 304 stainless steel mufflers) with a custom X-pipe from Stainless Works, featuring 4" dual outlets and integrated electric cutouts for track use.

Suspension & Handling: Swap the OEM Magnetic Ride Control for a full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (2-way adjustable dampers, 20-way rebound, and 16-way compression) with custom valving for the ZL1’s 3,850 lb weight, paired with a BMR Fabrication tubular K-member and adjustable front and rear sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) with spherical end links from Whiteline.

Drivetrain: Upgrade to a Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch transmission with a custom bellhousing adapter from RPM Transmissions, paired with a South Bend Clutch twin-disc organic/metallic hybrid clutch (rated for 1,000 lb-ft) and a 3.91:1 limited-slip differential from Strange Engineering with a carbon fiber driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop.
estetica: Aero: Install a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed front splitter from APR Performance (adjustable 3-stage dive planes) and a carbon fiber GT wing from Varis (1,200mm span, 300mm chord, 30mm adjustable height).

Wheels: Fit a set of custom HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x11 front, 20x12 rear) with a 5x120 bolt pattern, +25mm front and +40mm rear offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear) for track use, or Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R for street/track hybrid setups.

Interior: Replace the OEM seats with a pair of Recaro Pole Position SPG XL bucket seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point harnesses) mounted on custom Bride seat sliders, paired with a full carbon fiber dash overlay from Seibon and a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly with integrated harness bar).
